Stub functions for requesting Bluetooth GAP LE device names.

# Purpose
This C source code file defines two functions related to Bluetooth device name requests. The function [`bt_driver_gap_le_device_name_request`](<#bt_driver_gap_le_device_name_request>) takes a pointer to a `BTDeviceInternal` structure as an argument and is intended to handle a request for the device name of a specific Bluetooth connection. The function [`bt_driver_gap_le_device_name_request_all`](<#bt_driver_gap_le_device_name_request_all>) is designed to handle requests for the device names of all Bluetooth connections. Both functions are currently empty, indicating that their implementations are not yet provided. The file includes the header `bluetooth/gap_le_device_name.h`, which likely contains necessary declarations and definitions related to Bluetooth device name operations.
